summary: Iteration 11 - Testing 2 NEW Features: Narrated Reports (TTS) + Refined World Map. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working.

issues: Minor React warning: textTransform prop on DOM element - non-blocking

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/voice/narrate-report returns audio/mpeg blob for English (en)
Backend: POST /api/voice/narrate-report works with Portuguese (pt) language
Backend: POST /api/voice/narrate-report works with Spanish (es) language
Backend: POST /api/voice/narrate-report does NOT require authentication (no 401)
Backend: POST /api/voice/narrate-report defaults to English when language not specified
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/geopolitical-risk returns 8 regions
Backend: All 8 region IDs match: middle_east, russia_europe, east_asia, south_america, north_america, south_asia, africa, oceania
Backend: Each region has required fields: id, name, risk_score, risk_level, events, impacted_assets
Backend: global_risk_score is calculated and returned
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/events-feed returns events with categories for filtering
Frontend: Intel Terminal page loads with data-testid='intel-map-page'
Frontend: Refined World Map SVG found (viewBox 0 0 900 420)
Frontend: 8 clickable region hotspots on map (animated)
Frontend: Risk legend showing CRITICAL, HIGH, ELEVATED, LOW levels
Frontend: 'AUREOS AI QUANTICA' watermark on map
Frontend: 8 region buttons in Risk Detail side panel
Frontend: Risk Detail panel shows region info when clicked (name, score, events, impacted assets)
Frontend: 4/4 Intelligence Feed category filters (ALL, GEOPOLITICS, MACRO, CRYPTO)
Frontend: Crypto filter click works
Frontend: Scenario Analysis input field found and accepts text
Frontend: Executive Report Modal opens after running analysis
Frontend: Language selector dropdown found (data-testid='narration-lang-select') with 7 languages
Frontend: Narrate button found (data-testid='narrate-report-btn')
Frontend: Export PDF button found (data-testid='export-pdf-btn')
Frontend: Close button found (data-testid='close-report-btn')
Frontend: Modal shows Signal Summary, Action Plan, Technical Indicators, Market Structure, Monte Carlo Results
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: narrate-report endpoint correctly uses GPT-5.2 to create narration script in target language, then OpenAI TTS (onyx voice) to generate audio
Backend: Endpoint supports 7 languages: en, pt, es, fr, de, zh, ja
Backend: Returns raw audio/mpeg blob (not base64) for direct browser playback
Backend: No authentication required for narrate-report endpoint (by design)
Frontend: ExecutiveReportModal has proper data-testids for all interactive elements
Frontend: WorldMap component uses detailed SVG paths for continent outlines
Frontend: Region hotspots have color-coded risk indicators with animations for high-risk regions
Frontend: Connection lines drawn between high-risk regions (>55 score)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested 2 new features: (1) POST /api/voice/narrate-report for AI-narrated executive reports with language selection (7 languages supported via GPT-5.2 + OpenAI TTS, returns audio/mpeg blob, no auth required), (2) Refined WorldMap component at /app/frontend/src/components/maps/WorldMap.jsx with detailed continent SVG paths, 8 animated region hotspots, connection lines between high-risk regions, risk legend, and AUREOS AI QUANTICA watermark. ExecutiveReportModal has narration UI with data-testids: narration-lang-select, narrate-report-btn, export-pdf-btn, close-report-btn. Intel Terminal page has data-testids: intel-map-page, risk-btn-{region_id}, filter-{category}, scenario-input, scenario-submit-btn.

mocked_components.note: NO mocked APIs - narration uses real GPT-5.2 + OpenAI TTS via Emergent LLM key
real_apis: POST /api/voice/narrate-report: GPT-5.2 for narration script + OpenAI TTS (onyx voice) for audio generation
GET /api/intelligence/geopolitical-risk: Pre-defined 8 regions with risk score randomization

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Both new features (Narrated Reports and Refined World Map) working correctly.
